overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through heavy rain on elevated highways and desert roads. The player transitions from an urban bridge structure to the Badlands desert area, passing billboards and rocky terrain while following traffic and navigating wet road conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with bridge structures

events.description: black SUV ahead signals left and moves to left lane
vehicle takes right exit ramp, separating from SUV which continues straight

agents.ego_description: driving on wet elevated highway, maintaining speed around 60 km/h while following a black SUV through heavy rain

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving ahead in same lane, later moves left and continues on main highway

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway structure
concrete safety barrier along the right edge of the elevated road
highway signage suspended over the road indicating directions
distant industrial buildings and structures visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during a heavy rainstorm, passing under massive concrete bridge supports. The road is wet and reflective, with concrete barriers lining the sides. A black SUV is followed ahead until it moves left at a junction, while the camera vehicle takes a right exit ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp descending from elevated structure into desert

events.description: exits elevated highway onto curving ramp, leaving bridge structure behind
large digital billboards become visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating a curving exit ramp, descending from the elevated highway while reducing speed

entered.detail: tall digital advertising billboards with colorful displays visible through the rain
rocky hills and desert landscape beginning to appear alongside the road
concrete barrier along the right side of the descending ramp

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends a curving exit ramp leaving the elevated highway behind. Large digital billboards appear on the right side against a backdrop of rocky desert terrain. The environment transitions from urban infrastructure to desert landscape as the road curves downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway passing through rocky canyon with billboards

events.description: passing a distinctive dome-shaped diner and gas station structure on the right
passing abandoned vehicles on the right shoulder of the desert highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the desert highway, passing through rocky canyon sections and approaching a diner structure

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon walls flanking both sides of the highway
large metal structures spanning the road supporting multiple advertising screens
futuristic dome-shaped building with orange lighting, likely a diner or gas station
electrical transmission towers and lines running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving through a desert canyon highway flanked by rocky cliffs and large overhead billboards. The vehicle passes a distinctive dome-shaped diner structure on the right and abandoned vehicles along the shoulder. Power lines run parallel to the road as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with Joshua trees and railroad crossing

events.description: approaching and passing a railroad crossing with red and white barrier arms on the right

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed down a straight desert road, passing Joshua trees and navigating past a railroad crossing

entered.detail: distinctive desert trees with spiky branches scattered across the landscape
red and white striped barrier arms at a railroad crossing alongside the highway
tall saguaro cacti visible in the desert scrub

segments.scene_description: The highway stretches straight through open desert terrain populated by Joshua trees and scattered cacti. The vehicle passes a railroad crossing with red and white barriers before continuing down the long, straight road flanked by power lines and sparse desert vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a rain-slicked urban highway into the arid expanse of a desert canyon. It begins under massive concrete bridge supports during a heavy rainstorm, following a black SUV across reflective pavement before peeling away onto a right-hand exit ramp. As the vehicle descends the curving ramp, the urban infrastructure gives way to rocky terrain and towering digital billboards that signal the shift into the Badlands. The scene then opens into a desert canyon flanked by rocky cliffs and power lines, passing a dome-shaped diner and abandoned cars along the shoulder. Finally, the road straightens out into an open desert landscape populated by Joshua trees and cacti, crossing a railroad barrier as the highway stretches toward the horizon.
